note: Seven works (volume Inhalt p1052). Detail Uebersichten: 'Bruno' (p1190-1192) and 'Fernere Darstellungen aus dem System der Philosophie' (p1259-1262), both editor-added discursive synopses; page-bearing lines + section headers captured.
